summary: Backend testing complete for iteration 27 features: VIP codes with duration/quantity, info banner, and TV/radio voting. All 24 automated tests passed, 2 skipped due to rate limiting. Manual verification confirmed VIP code activation and 403 protection.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/vip-codes with {type:'vip_plus', duration_days:60, quantity:3} returns 3 codes with duration_days=60
POST /api/admin/vip-codes without quantity defaults to 1 code
POST /api/admin/vip-codes with type='admin' still works (no duration)
GET /api/admin/vip-codes returns list with duration_days field
DELETE /api/admin/vip-codes/{id} removes a code
POST /api/user/activate-code with VIP+ 30-day code sets is_vip=true, is_vip_plus=true, vip_expires_at ~30 days in future (manual test)
POST /api/user/activate-code with already-used code returns 400 (manual test)
GET /api/info-banner returns {banner: null} when disabled
PUT /api/admin/info-banner with {enabled:true, message:'Test', variant:'promo', dismissible:true} persists and version increments
PUT /api/admin/info-banner requires admin (401 without auth)
PUT /api/admin/info-banner requires admin (403 for non-admin)
GET /api/info-banner returns banner object when enabled
GET /api/admin/info-banner returns current banner config (admin only)
GET /api/admin/info-banner without auth returns 401
POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote with {vote:'like'} toggles like, returns {likes, dislikes, user_vote:'like'}
POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote twice with 'like' REMOVES the vote (toggle off)
POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote with 'like' then 'dislike' flips vote
POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote with invalid vote string returns 400
POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote without auth returns 401
POST /api/radio-stations/{id}/vote works the same way as tv-channels
GET /api/media-votes/mine returns list of current user's votes
GET /api/tv-channels returns channels with likes/dislikes fields (default 0)
GET /api/radio-stations returns stations with likes/dislikes fields (default 0)
Security headers present on /api/info-banner (X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff)
Security headers present on /api/tv-channels
Security headers present on /api/radio-stations
Security headers present on /api/admin/vip-codes

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 passed, 2 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: VIP codes created during testing (auto-cleaned by test flow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 27 backend features validated: (1) VIP codes now support duration_days (default 30) and quantity (1-50) - on activation, vip_expires_at is set correctly. (2) Info banner: GET /api/info-banner (public), PUT/GET /api/admin/info-banner (admin only with 401/403 protection). Version auto-bumps when message changes or enabled flips to true. (3) Votes on TV/radio: POST /api/tv-channels/{id}/vote and /api/radio-stations/{id}/vote with {vote:'like'|'dislike'}. Same vote twice = remove. Different vote = flip. GET /api/media-votes/mine returns user's votes. Security headers present on all new endpoints.
